# ArenaMCP — Agent Guidance

## Core Truths
- Integrates with BepInEx for ground-truth card positions.
- Features a transparent click-through overlay for real-time advice.
- Provides a native Windows desktop app for coaching delivery.
- Core logic spans `launcher.py` and `windows_integration.py`.

## Project Purpose
Real-time AI coaching for MTG Arena with in-game overlay.

## Key Files
- launcher.py
- windows_integration.py
- AGENTS.md
- README.md
